reconciliation_note: Added Australia to the canonical public-health curation from handbook and comparative epidemiology sources because it was absent from the shared formulation table.

candidate_note: Long acellular era with PRN-containing vaccines and published antigen-validated PRN-deficient emergence.

candidate_note: Mixed PRN-containing amplification context: the selected epoch isolates the PRN-containing booster / maternal exposure layer while leaving the whole-cell childhood baseline outside the selected rows.
source_citation: Brazil Ministry of Health dTpa page; 2024 national schedule instruction; Ministry pages for maternal dTpa use
notes_on_uncertainty: Brazil retains whole-cell DTP in the childhood programme but also uses PRN-positive maternal / adult dTpa. Ministry of Health materials identify 2014 as the start of gestational dTpa use, so the selected epoch begins in 2014 and captures a mixed PRN-containing amplification context rather than a clean PRN-only primary schedule.
reconciliation_note: Added Brazil as the mixed PRN-containing amplification case needed to satisfy Gate A.

candidate_note: China now carries an explicit whole-cell baseline anchored to the national planned immunization programme rather than being collapsed into one mixed post-2000 row.
source_citation: China CDC pertussis vaccine immunoprophylaxis page
notes_on_uncertainty: China CDC reports that whole-cell pertussis vaccination began in the 1960s and entered planned immunization in 1978. This row uses 1978 as the routine national-programme anchor.
reconciliation_note: Added an explicit China whole-cell baseline after re-checking the China CDC programme-history page.

candidate_note: China's DTaP introduction interval is now represented as a true mixed transition period rather than being merged into a single modern mixed-acellular row.
epoch_label: DTaP introduction and mixed transition period
source_citation: China CDC pertussis vaccine immunoprophylaxis page; Emerging Infectious Diseases review of China vaccine transition
notes_on_uncertainty: China CDC states that DTaP was marketed in 2005, entered the National Immunization Program in 2007, and fully replaced DTwP in 2012, so 2005-2011 is treated as a mixed wP/aP transition window.
reconciliation_note: Added a China mixed transition epoch so the selected-country screen no longer skips the 2005-2011 programme changeover.

candidate_note: Post-2012 China provides a fully acellular but antigen-heterogeneous background with recent interpretable genomes and recurrent IS481 disruption.
epoch_label: Post-switch acellular era with mixed PRN exposure
source_citation: China CDC pertussis vaccine immunoprophylaxis page; Shenzhen Kangtai DTaP-Hib-IPV product page; recent China vaccine genomics and review papers
notes_on_uncertainty: DTaP completely replaced DTwP by 2012, but currently used Chinese acellular products remain compositionally heterogeneous rather than uniformly PRN-positive or PRN-free.
reconciliation_note: Promoted China into the selected-country framework after replacing the old coarse 2000-2024 mixed row with programme-history epochs anchored to China CDC guidance.

candidate_note: PRN-positive acellular window without a whole-cell baseline in the selected-country design; the later PRN-free and mixed Czech procurement windows are kept outside the default Stage 1 comparison.
source_citation: Czech 2018 hexavaccine recommendation; EMA Infanrix hexa
notes_on_uncertainty: Czech guidance keeps Infanrix hexa as the PRN-positive routine product in the 2007-2017 interval. Later Hexacima-only and mixed-brand years are excluded here so the selected-country design retains a clean PRN-positive amplification window.
reconciliation_note: Added Czechia as the missing PRN-positive amplification case needed to balance the selected-country role set.

candidate_note: Pre-acellular French baseline retained so the wP-to-mixed-aP transition can be screened against the local genome panel.

candidate_note: French acellular era with mixed-brand PRN exposure, one local IS481 disruption, and later intact genomes.

candidate_note: Recovered historical whole-cell UK genomes provide a usable pre-2004 baseline against the later PRN-positive acellular programme.
source_citation: UKHSA vaccine timeline; pertussis immunisation history review
notes_on_uncertainty: The UKHSA historical review places the primary-schedule acellular switch in 2004. This row is truncated to the earliest interpretable pre-switch isolates recovered from the current genome panel.
reconciliation_note: Added a pre-2004 UK whole-cell baseline after recovering missing historical assemblies from NCBI so the selected-country screen can assess a full UK schedule transition.

candidate_note: UK acellular-era baseline retained for the selected-country comparison against the recovered whole-cell historical genome panel.

source_citation: UKHSA hexavalent programme guidance; GOV.UK pertussis vaccine use; EMA Infanrix Hexa; Merck VAXELIS PI
notes_on_uncertainty: The UK infant programme uses PRN-positive acellular products after the 2004 switch. The row is kept open through 2024 to match the current public-health curation.
reconciliation_note: Reused the existing UK acellular-programme curation row so the selected-country screen can compare it against the rescued pre-2004 whole-cell baseline.

candidate_note: Japan remains the most informative PRN-removal context, but the historical pre-2012 acellular period is formulation-heterogeneous and the local genomes are sparse before the switch.
epoch_label: Historical acellular era with mixed PRN exposure
source_citation: Japanese PRN-deficient surveillance study; CDC review of pertactin-deficient expansion
notes_on_uncertainty: The Japan-specific literature indicates that only 3 of 5 long-used DTaP brands contained PRN before the 2012 DTaP-IPV change, so this interval is not a clean PRN-containing counterfactual.
reconciliation_note: Replaced the previous hand-curated pre-2012 Japan row with a canonical mixed-exposure interval because the primary literature does not support uniformly PRN-containing historical exposure.

candidate_note: Post-2012 PRN-free era provides the clearest comparator for reduced PRN-specific selection pressure.

notes_on_uncertainty: In the current repo this is the only informative Japanese epoch. It supports cross-country triangulation, but not a stable two-epoch within-country comparison on its own.
reconciliation_note: Split the original canonical Japan row at 2012 so the selected-country report can distinguish the current PRN-free programme from the earlier mixed aP era.

candidate_note: PRN-positive acellular window without a whole-cell baseline in the selected-country design; the Dutch routine programme can serve as the missing amplification comparator once the selected epoch is isolated.

notes_on_uncertainty: RIVM leaflets list Vaxelis for DTaP-IPV-Hib-HBV vaccination and Boostrix for DTaP use, and EMA product information for Vaxelis shows pertussis toxoid, filamentous haemagglutinin, and pertactin. RIVM's programme-change history ties the switch to birth cohort 2005, so the selected epoch now begins in 2005.
reconciliation_note: Added the Netherlands as the missing PRN-positive amplification case needed to satisfy Gate A.
